Effective Fall 2024

General Education Requirements Fundamental Studies Requirements: 15 credits Academic Writing (FSAW) Professional Writing (FSPW) Oral Communication (FSOC) Math (FSMA) Analytic Reasoning (FSAR) Distributive Studies Requirements: 25 credits Natural Science Lab (DSNL) Natural Science (DSNS) History/Social Science (DSHS) History/Social Science (DSHS) Humanities (DSHU) Humanities (DSHU) Scholarship in Practice (DSSP) Sch. in Pract. (DSSP) non-major Big Question (Normally double counted with Distributive Studies) Requirements: 6 credits Big Question (SCIS) Big Question (SCIS) Diversity (Overlap permitted with Distributive Studies and/or Big Question) Requirements: 6 credits Understanding Plural Soc. (DVUP)

Major Requirements Gateway Requirements (Must be completed with a C- or higher by 45 credits excluding AP/IB/dual enrollment credit) Course 3 MATH120/140/136 3 BMGT220 BMGT230 3 Major Requirements
